task_tokens_consumed: Does any 2024-2026 paper propose adaptive transformer-layer routing based on a homological-style filtration-convergence signal rather than entropy/logit-confidence early-exit?

hypothesized_clusters.cluster_description: Hierarchical layer structures for efficient attention.
Spectral analysis of intermediate transformer reps for stability/efficiency.
Persistent homology and homological methods applied to NN representations.
Conditional computation that varies depth per input.

landscape_completeness_claim: Five clusters span entropy early-exit, hierarchical attention, spectral filtering, topological methods, and adaptive depth. Candidate intersects most of these even though the spectral-sequence-specific framing is uncommon.
